About

Good n' Rowdy is a high-energy cover band bringing the best of country, rock, and everything in between to stages across the region. Known for their tight setlists and infectious energy, they keep the dance floor full all night long.

CountryRockCountry RockCover Band

Based in Nashville, TN · Est. 2018

The Band
